ttrpg.active_quest: Investigate the disappearances in the Mistmarsh
ttrpg.house_rule_critical_hit: Max weapon dice plus a roll, doubled modifiers
ttrpg.house_rule_potions: Drinking a potion is a bonus action; administering is an action
ttrpg.house_rule_inspiration: Inspiration gives advantage on any one roll and can be held by multiple characters simultaneously
ttrpg.death_threshold: Character death is permanent unless revived by in-story means
ttrpg.character_names: Thorin Ironforge (fighter), Lyra Shadowmend (wizard), Brother Cedric (cleric), Whisper (rogue)
